_comment: Mergers whose events table on the ACCC website is known to be incorrect. For these, the existing events from mergers.json are preserved as-is rather than being overwritten by bad scraped data. Remove a merger from this list once the ACCC has fixed their website.
MN-01019: Ampol / EG Australia: ACCC site has wrong dates on events table (NOCC summary shows 2025-11-06 instead of 2026-03-02; Phase 2 notice shows 2026-03-02 instead of 2026-01-21)
